zh.lifeSummary: 當Jeanne de Fiennes於大約1310年出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯範恩斯時，她的父親Jean I de Fiennes33歲，母親Isabelle de Dampierre36歲。她於1329年12月與Jean de Châtillon Count de St. Pol結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1353年6月7日在法國享年44歲。

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Jeanne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Jeanne de Fiennes was born about 1310, in Fiennes, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, her father, Jean I de Fiennes, was 33 and her mother, Isabelle de Dampierre, was 36. She married Jean de Châtillon Count de St. Pol in December 1329. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died on 7 June 1353, in France, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jeanne de Fiennes est née environ 1310, à Fiennes, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Jean I de Fiennes, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Isabelle de Dampierre, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé Jean de Châtillon Count de St. Pol en décembre 1329. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 7 juin 1353, à France, à l’âge de 44 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jeanne de Fiennes um 1310 in Fiennes, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Jean I de Fiennes 33 und ihre Mutter Isabelle de Dampierre 36. Sie hat im Dezember 1329 Jean de Châtillon Count de St. Pol geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 7. Juni 1353 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne de Fiennes è nata il circa 1310 nel Fiennes, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, sua padre, Jean I de Fiennes, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Isabelle de Dampierre, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato Jean de Châtillon Count de St. Pol nel dicembre 1329. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 7 giugno 1353, nel Francia, all'età di 44 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jeanne de Fiennesが約1310年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスフィーンスで生まれた時，父Jean I de Fiennesは33歳，母Isabelle de Dampierreは36歳であった。1329年12月にJean de Châtillon Count de St. Polと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1353年6月7日にフランスで44歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jeanne de Fiennes(이)가 대략 1310년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 피네스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Jean I de Fiennes(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabelle de Dampierre(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 1329년 12월 Jean de Châtillon Count de St. Pol(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1353년 6월 7일 프랑스에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne de Fiennes nasceu aproximadamente 1310, em Fiennes, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Jean I de Fiennes, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Isabelle de Dampierre, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com Jean de Châtillon Count de St. Pol em dezembro de 1329. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 7 de junho de 1353, em França, com 44 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jeanne de Fiennes родилась около 1310 г. в местности фиеннесь, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция, её отцу по имени Jean I de Fiennes было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Isabelle de Dampierre, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jean de Châtillon Count de St. Pol декабрь 1329 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла 7 июня 1353 г. в местности Франция в возрасте 44 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jeanne de Fiennes nació aproximadamente 1310, en Fiennes, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, su papá, Jean I de Fiennes, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Isabelle de Dampierre, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Jean de Châtillon Count de St. Pol en diciembre de 1329. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 7 de junio de 1353, en Francia, a la edad de 44 años.
